capability: max_tokens, stop sequences, EOS stop behavior

harness.working_tree: WIN2METAL Phase 2 (Bucket A) validation on Apple M4 16GB. Binary is the FROZEN base build /Volumes/Untitled/camelid-base-28f224b (camelid v0.1.7-92-g28f224b, commit 28f224b); no src changes in this branch. Outputs salvaged under qa/capability/mac_*_out/<row>/.
harness.e2e_harness: qa/capability/* Metal harness; outputs under qa/capability/mac_*_out/llama-3.2-1b

evidence.summary: e2e on Metal (qa/capability/smoke.sh, Apple M4): max_tokens honored (n=3 -> 18 completion tokens = 6 per choice) and EOS stop observed (greedy min_p/repeat_penalty request halted with finish_reason "stop", content "Blue!"). Behavior (class-C) re-confirmed on the Metal backend; bit-exact stop-parity vs llama.cpp not separately run. Evidence: qa/capability/mac_smoke_out/llama-3.2-1b/samplers.json, n3.json.
